structured_payload_candidate.title: ASHRAE 211-2018 Complements PCBEA
structured_payload_candidate.summary: ASHRAE 211-2018 is a complement to the PCBEA.

evidence_text:
Introduction
•The ASHRAE 211 -2018
Standard
•A complement to the
PCBEA
•Brings order into
chaos of Energy
Audits
•Establishes energy
audit levels 1, 2, 3
•Establishes
Preliminary Energy
Use Analysis Methods
•Establishes a
minimum
performance standard
for energy audits
This is the
PCBEA!
judge_reason: States ASHRAE 211 complements PCBEA without providing HVAC-specific operational knowledge; purely contextual.
